title: Dogfood Pass 0012 Quantum No-Cloning Proof Packet

claims.text: Pass 0012 created a NoCloningProbe/v1 artifact reporting PROBE_MATCH: CNOT clones |0> and |1> basis fixtures with fidelity 1.0 and fails the |+> superposition clone fixture with fidelity 0.5.
claims.falsification: schemas/no-cloning-probe-pass-0012.json is missing, reports non-PROBE_MATCH status, lacks two passing basis checks with fidelity 1.0, or does not report FAILS_SUPERPOSITION with fidelity 0.5

claims.text: Pass 0012 records the inner-product no-cloning impossibility for |0> and |+>, including overlap 0.707106781186547, overlap_squared 0.5, and positive defect 0.207106781186548.
claims.falsification: schemas/no-cloning-probe-pass-0012.json lacks the inner_product_impossibility fields or reports nonpositive defect

claims.text: Pass 0012 created a 13-row quantum market map covering quantum-sdk, cloud-platform, hardware-platform, quantum-ai, quantum-compiler, neutral-atom, and annealing categories.
claims.falsification: schemas/quantum-computing-market-map-pass-0012.json has fewer than 13 rows or omits any required category

claims.text: Every pass 0012 market-map row includes an HTTPS source URL, proof receipt gap, Telos wedge hypothesis, gap status, and confidence label.
claims.falsification: any row in schemas/quantum-computing-market-map-pass-0012.json lacks a required field, uses a non-HTTPS source URL, or has an invalid gap_status

claims.text: Pass 0012 created a ProofPacket/v1 no-cloning packet with at least four claims and no PROMOTED_LAW state.
claims.falsification: schemas/no-cloning-proof-packet-pass-0012.json is missing, is not ProofPacket/v1, has fewer than four claims, or contains PROMOTED_LAW

claims.text: The pass 0012 validators report MATCH: the quantum validator reports three matches and zero drift, and the proof-packet validator reports one match and zero drift.
claims.falsification: schemas/pass-0012-quantum-validator-result.json or schemas/proof-packet-validator-pass-0012.json is missing, reports non-MATCH status, or reports drift above zero

claims.text: Pass 0012 attempted Forum steelman twice but preserved the executor JSON error as UNVERIFIABLE rather than treating it as a successful Forum adversarial result.
claims.falsification: adversarial/pass-0012-forum-steelman.md is missing, does not record the Forum executor JSON error, or schemas/no-cloning-proof-packet-pass-0012.json does not mark ForumSteelman as UNVERIFIABLE

claims.text: Pass 0012 promotes zero new theorems, quantum hardware results, quantum advantage claims, cryptographic breaks, natural laws, or scientific discoveries.
claims.falsification: any pass 0012 artifact labels a new theorem, hardware result, quantum advantage claim, cryptographic break, natural law, biological result, material result, medical result, finance result, or safety result as promoted
